vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where gender_bio = F or is NULL
current||vfrag=birthday_bio.fragment_role_B: rows where gender_bio = F or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where first_name = John + rows where first_name = William
rows where first_name = James + rows where first_name = Joseph + rows where first_name = Henry
rows where first_name = Thomas + rows where first_name = Charles + rows where first_name = George + rows where first_name = Robert
rows where first_name is NULL or not in {'John', 'William', 'James', 'Thomas', 'Charles', 'George', 'Robert', 'Joseph', 'Henry'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
historical||vfrag=ballotpedia_id_2.fragment_role_A: rows where first_name = John + rows where first_name = William
historical||vfrag=ballotpedia_id_2.fragment_role_B: rows where first_name = James + rows where first_name = Joseph + rows where first_name = Henry

fragment_roles: rows where end > 1937-01-03 or is NULL
rows where start > 2015-01-06 or is NULL

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
